PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thornton Kontz for Theresa Stolaroff and Frank Monforte (Petitioners).

Mr. Kontz stated that there have been no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
